status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
notes: Official portal for UAE federal legislation.

data.official_name: Federal Decree-Law No. 45 of 2021 on the Protection of Personal Data
data.description: First comprehensive UAE federal data-protection statute, in force January 2022. GDPR-influenced consent/rights/cross-border-transfer rules. Excludes DIFC and ADGM (which have their own separate free-zone data protection regimes) and national-security government data.
